topics.title: Radio Show Dynamics and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of group interview dynamics, the impact of listener feedback on production choices, and the inclusion of various pre-recorded segments.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson and The View
topics.summary: The studio plays clips of a bizarre press conference involving O.J. Simpson's legal team and a segment from The View featuring Sherry Shepard discussing the shape of the earth.

topics.title: Hunter's Military Deployment and Past
topics.summary: The studio discusses a guest named Hunter, who describes his transition from a successful career in the t-shirt business and social circles to joining the military for deployment to Iraq.

topics.title: Addiction to Heroin
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the physical and psychological toll of heroin addiction, including the transition from cocaine use and the cycle of dependency.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Upcoming Television Programs
topics.summary: The studio discusses a tabloid report regarding Maureen McCormick's memoir, the medical realities of an obesity clinic documentary, upcoming television shows like Heroes and Dancing with the Stars, and a promotional trailer for a history of Howard Stern.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson Stolen Property Negotiation
topics.summary: The studio features a caller who describes his involvement in an attempt to recover stolen memorabilia from O.J. Simpson through a deal involving signed books and secret recordings of the negotiations.

topics.title: Stolen Memorabilia and O.J. Simpson Confrontation
topics.summary: The studio features a man who claims to have recorded tapes of an intense confrontation involving O.J. Simpson over stolen sports memorabilia, while also detailing his past as a prison escapee.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson Case and Film Nudity
topics.summary: The studio discusses details of an O.J. Simpson-related incident involving weapons and stolen property before transitioning to a discussion on film nudity and the release of a new guide by Mr. Skin.

topics.title: Analysis of Cinematic Nudity and Film History
topics.summary: The studio explores various films featuring notable nudity, discussing specific scenes in movies like Wild Side, Bound, and Showgirls while detailing the history of tracking such content from the era of Betamax to digital media.

topics.title: Film Nudity and Cinema Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses a collection of films featuring nudity, the business of tracking celebrity appearances in adult media, and various cinematic scenes from movies like "Caligula" and "The Godfather."

topics.title: Host Confronts Guest Over Allegations
topics.summary: The studio records a heated exchange as a guest's claims regarding personal interactions and professional conduct lead to an aggressive confrontation with another caller.

topics.title: Hayden Porter Interview and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Hayden Porter regarding her experiences in the media and a segment of celebrity gossip stories from Mike Walker.

topics.title: Conan O'Brien and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show features a segment on Conan O'Brien’s interaction with a woman at a cheese stand, followed by discussions regarding celebrity rumors, the age of comedian Benji Bronck, and upcoming segments involving Mr. Skin and Tabitha Stevens.

topics.title: Media News and Legal Cases
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including divorce statistics, celebrity news regarding Ryan Seacrest and Tracy Morgan, legal disputes involving Dan Rather and an adult film actor, and the ongoing protests surrounding the Jena Six.

topics.title: Social Issues and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a wide range of topics including racial tensions, the challenges faced by Black quarterbacks in the NFL, new HIV treatments, celebrity news involving Bill Clinton and Arnold Schwarzenegger, and various crime reports.
